page_title: The Company of the Wandering Star
page_subtitle: A ledger of those who walk · and those they have laid down
intro_epithet: Five travellers and a storyteller, bound to a doomed road
footnote: The names above are the names given · the ones who fell were given no names

known.name: The Ring of Winter
known.gloss: bound to Artus Cimber's hand, last seen opening an eye of frost on a deck of pirates.

known.name: The Soulmonger
known.gloss: engine of the Death Curse, somewhere in Chult.

known.name: The Death Curse
known.gloss: the dead will not stay raised, and the lately-raised waste in their flesh.

known.name: Azlund's Oath
known.gloss: fifty gold paid in hand, one rare gift each on return, if the Curse can be broken.

known.name: The Map of Chult
known.gloss: half-marked, given by Azlund at the Waterdeep docks.

known.name: The Sending Stone
known.gloss: Vex carries the pair, and Azlund waits at the other end.

known.name: Saja N'baza
known.gloss: a name in Chult, sought by Artus for word of his lost wife.

known.name: The Yuan-ti's Door
known.gloss: a yuan-ti drew blood and fled within; Wickles watches from the eaves.

road_ahead.direction: One hex from Fort Righteous, the company means to read what felled the Gauntlet's outpost before pressing on toward Hrakhamar.

gm.name: The Dungeon Master
gm.epithet: who rolls for every shadow, who speaks for the unseen
